subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Thy letter of the twenty-sixth of Dhi'l-Qa'dih 1328 was received. A response was sent several days ago [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه بیست و ششم ذی القعده ۱۳۲۸ وصول یافت چند روز پیش جواب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
